Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Whaddaya think of the girls here compared to your old school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I'm talking about how many hot chicks there are! Our school's girls rank pretty high, if you ask me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I know, right? Our school has tons of hot chicks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}So your old school had lots of hot chicks too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude, there are some seriously hot chicks at this school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Which is great, but it also makes it harder to approach them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}If there's a girl you wanna date, you gotta be smart about how you talk to her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}You seem to know Kirijo-san, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}...you're not going after her, are you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I don't think that's a good idea, since she lives in a totally different world than the rest of us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I have a feeling that if a guy tries something funny, her bodyguards will break his neck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Good. You'd have to be pretty stupid to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Ghosts can be creepy, but they don't have to be, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}If there was a ghost that looked like a cute girl, I wouldn't mind being haunted by it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Well... As long as she doesn't devour my soul or somethin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Well, I've checked out all the new first-year girls...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}They're all pretty cute... But the glasses girl in the student council is especially cute, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I saw a girl in a gothic lolita getup in front of the station...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Man, she was so cute, I had to go up and ask her out![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I said, "Hey, wanna catch a movie or somethin'?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}But she didn't even move, except for breathing! She didn't even bother looking my way...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}My ego still hasn't recovered...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}You hear about that couple they found together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Part of me is glad it wasn't me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}...and the other part is jealous, since I've never had a girlfriend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude, I was tryna pick up some chicks the other day at the station, but it didn't go as planned.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}It's hard when a girl has her guard up, huh? Maybe a more honest approach would work better...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}What the heck? It's pretty rare for a hottie like that to transfer in at this time of the year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude, get a clue! I'm talkin' about Aigis![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}A mysterious babe like that... I want to know everything about her! Like her measurements![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I heard a rumor that you went to Kirijo-san's vacation home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Not only that, but Takeba, Yamagishi, and Aigis were there, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}And the best part of the rumor is they were all wearing bathing suits! Is that true!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}No way! Are you serious!? Wait, don't say anymore. I can't take it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Why!? Why are you so damn lucky!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Yeah, I thought so. That's way too good to be true.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude, the mall sucks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I was trying to pick up this girl, but some cop kept staring at me like he meant business...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude, I went to the middle school to check out next year's first-years...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}...and the cops came after me! Can you believe that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I got away, but I didn't get to see if there were any hotties.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude! That new transfer student is a total chick magnet![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I guess he does kinda stand out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Ugh, I really hate guys who have good looks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude, I was looking forward to meeting some babes on that trip.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}But I guess things rarely go as you hope...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Well, at least I got to see our school's girls in yukatas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude, have you noticed? Around Christmastime, people flirt like crazy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}And the magazines are filled with sappy pictures. Isn't that overkill?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Man, I wish Santa would bring me a girlfriend this year...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}All those people who hooked up during Christmas are just fooling themselves.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Their relationships won't last, man. They treat each other like accessories.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Man, I'm glad I didn't hook up with anyone around then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude, I was invited into that cult thing again...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I wonder who's in charge of that mess.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I bet he's a chick magnet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}I tried talking to a girl at the station the other day, and man, it was the worst![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}She was a believer of that cult, and she kept going on about Nyx-sama this, Nyx-sama that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}What a letdown, man. Who the hell is this Nyx guy anyway? I wanna learn his technique...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Dude, why did the culture festival hafta be canceled?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}It would've been a great chance for me to meet some girls from a different school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 308}Now I don't have anyone new to use my awesome pickup lines on...[n]{f 1 1}
